geographic_restrictions: New York State, excluding New York City (areas equal to or smaller than a county) or within one of the five boroughs of New York City
project_area: Environmental justice and public health concerns, including projects like public participatory science, community-driven water and air quality monitoring, urban farming, habitat restoration, tree plantings, curriculum development, and green infrastructure installation
demographic_requirements: Projects must address exposure to multiple environmental harms and risks, include a new research component to expand community knowledge, and serve environmental justice or disadvantaged communities
eligibility_summary: Eligible organizations must be located in or serve residents of environmental justice or disadvantaged communities, have a total annual revenue less than $3 million, and be registered/prequalified in the Statewide Financial System (SFS) Grants Management System
